gorgos_war_shield.name: Gorgos' War Shield
gorgos_war_shield.lore: A battered tower shield once carried by Gorgos when he broke the Stonewatch line.

sundered_captain_sabre.name: Sundered Captain Sabre
sundered_captain_sabre.lore: The personal blade of the pass captain who ruled toll roads through fear.

ashbound_ring.name: Ashbound Ring
ashbound_ring.lore: A shrine ring scorched into black glass during the first ash vows.

huskmourne_pendant.name: Huskmourne Pendant
huskmourne_pendant.lore: A mourning charm worn by shrine wardens who stood watch through the long ash years.

stormbreak_navigator_compass.name: Stormbreak Navigator Compass
stormbreak_navigator_compass.lore: A bronze compass used by coast pilots to guide ferries through lightning squalls.

ironridge_sentinel_armor.name: Ironridge Sentinel Armor
ironridge_sentinel_armor.lore: Layered plate from the old mountain sentinels who held the ridge gates.

vault_core_blade.name: Vault Core Blade
vault_core_blade.lore: A relic-edge keyed to ancient lock runes, humming with sealed vault power.

vaultkeeper_ward_plate.name: Vaultkeeper Ward Plate
vaultkeeper_ward_plate.lore: Interlocked guardian plate engraved with maintenance vows from the first keepers.

shrineward_votive_chain.name: Shrineward Votive Chain
shrineward_votive_chain.lore: A silvered chain once worn by caretakers sworn to wake the stone guardian.

guardian_oath_bulwark.name: Guardian Oath Bulwark
guardian_oath_bulwark.lore: Stone-forged armor bound with vow script from the shrine's first defenders.

cinderbrand_gauntlet.name: Cinderbrand Gauntlet
cinderbrand_gauntlet.lore: A furnace-forged gauntlet stamped by the Ash Herald's burning sign.

emberfall_phoenix_cloak.name: Emberfall Phoenix Cloak
emberfall_phoenix_cloak.lore: A heat-scored cloak woven by Emberfall scouts who crossed fresh cinder fields.

valewood_huntmaster_quiver.name: Valewood Huntmaster Quiver
valewood_huntmaster_quiver.lore: A weathered quiver marked by generations of Valewood trail captains.

stonewatch_command_seal.name: Stonewatch Command Seal
stonewatch_command_seal.lore: A bronze officer's seal used to call watch companies to the old walls.

riverroad_wayfarer_boots.name: Riverroad Wayfarer Boots
riverroad_wayfarer_boots.lore: River-stained leather boots favored by couriers who outran toll ambushes.
